history.created_by: RUN /bin/sh -c apt-get update && apt-get install -y   sudo curl wget git ca-certificates unzip   libatk1.0-0   libatk-bridge2.0-0   libcups2   libdrm2   libdbus-1-3   libxkbcommon0   libxcomposite1   libxdamage1   libxfixes3   libxrandr2   libgbm1   libpango-1.0-0   libcairo2   libasound2t64   libatspi2.0-0   libxshmfence1   libgtk-3-0   libnss3   libnspr4   fonts-liberation   fonts-noto-color-emoji   fonts-noto-cjk   xvfb   xauth   locales   && locale-gen en_US.UTF-8   && apt-get clean   && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* # buildkit

RUN /bin/sh -c echo "ubuntu ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL" > /etc/sudoers.d/ubuntu &&   chmod 0440 /etc/sudoers.d/ubuntu &&   echo "Defaults:ubuntu !lecture" > /etc/sudoers.d/ubuntu-no-lecture &&   chmod 0440 /etc/sudoers.d/ubuntu-no-lecture &&   usermod -s /bin/bash ubuntu &&   mkdir -p /home/ubuntu &&   chown -R ubuntu:ubuntu /home/ubuntu &&   touch /home/ubuntu/.hushlogin # buildkit
RUN /bin/sh -c git clone https://github.com/creationix/nvm.git .nvm &&   cd .nvm &&   git checkout v0.40.3 # buildkit
RUN /bin/sh -c bash -c "source /usr/local/bin/nvm-init.sh && nvm install 22.* && nvm alias default 22.*" &&   bash -c "source /usr/local/bin/nvm-init.sh && npm i -g yarn pnpm" # buildkit

RUN /bin/sh -c DPKG_ARCH=$(dpkg --print-architecture) &&   if [ "$DPKG_ARCH" = "amd64" ]; then ARCH_SUFFIX=""; else ARCH_SUFFIX="-${DPKG_ARCH}"; fi &&   mkdir -p /home/ubuntu/.cache/ms-playwright &&   cd /home/ubuntu/.cache/ms-playwright &&   mkdir -p chromium-1148 && cd chromium-1148 &&   wget --progress=bar:force https://playwright.azureedge.net/builds/chromium/1148/chromium-linux${ARCH_SUFFIX}.zip &&   unzip -q chromium-linux${ARCH_SUFFIX}.zip &&   rm chromium-linux${ARCH_SUFFIX}.zip &&   cd .. &&   mkdir -p ffmpeg-1010 && cd ffmpeg-1010 &&   wget --progress=bar:force https://playwright.azureedge.net/builds/ffmpeg/1010/ffmpeg-linux${ARCH_SUFFIX}.zip &&   unzip -q ffmpeg-linux${ARCH_SUFFIX}.zip &&   rm ffmpeg-linux${ARCH_SUFFIX}.zip &&   cd .. &&   mkdir -p chromium_headless_shell-1148 && cd chromium_headless_shell-1148 &&   wget --progress=bar:force https://playwright.azureedge.net/builds/chromium/1148/chromium-headless-shell-linux${ARCH_SUFFIX}.zip &&   unzip -q chromium-headless-shell-linux${ARCH_SUFFIX}.zip &&   rm chromium-headless-shell-linux${ARCH_SUFFIX}.zip # buildkit

RUN /bin/sh -c echo 'export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"' > /home/ubuntu/.bashrc &&   echo '[ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"' >> /home/ubuntu/.bashrc &&   echo '[ -s "$NVM_DIR/bash_completion" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/bash_completion"' >> /home/ubuntu/.bashrc &&   echo 'export PS1="\[\033[36m\]\\W\[\033[0m\] $ "' >> /home/ubuntu/.bashrc # buildkit
